signals.headline: Flagg becomes first rookie with back-to-back 40+ point games | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Flagg becomes first rookie with back-to-back 40+ point games | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

Cooper Flagg scored 45 points with 9 assists and 8 rebounds to lead Dallas over Los Angeles on Sunday.[1] This followed his historic 51-point performance two nights prior, making him the first NBA teenager to record a 50-point game.[1] Flagg is now the first rookie with consecutive 40-point games since Al

Cavaliers lead Raptors 2-0 in series | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
